productName: Green Reaper Melted Diamond Badder - Gary Poppins - 1g
description: Creamy blond hybrid badder made from Gary Poppins — the whipping process draws the terpenes forward, giving this batter-textured dab a loud, fragrant nose. Smooth, blond, and aromatic, with notes of butter, diesel, and blueberry, leading into an even, best-of-both-worlds feel.
